description: Verify c_variadic feature isolation: only in printf_c_variadic.rs

build_all.description: Check that our rust codebase is healthy

constraint_build_all.description: Ensure our rust codebase is healthy

fts5_no_libc_global.description: Ensure fts5.rs contains no libc:: calls (only external C FFI allowed)
goals: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: direct calls
All C interop must go through safe wrappers or external C FFI only

fts5_no_libc_calls.description: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: calls - use safe wrappers or external C FFI instead

libs.description: sqlite3_str_appendf correctly exported in rlib and cdylib (.so)
goals: sqlite3_str_appendf (C FFI in c_code/printf_c.c) must be global symbol (T) in shell binary (rlib)
sqlite3_str_appendf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of libsqlite_noamalgam.so (cdylib)
sqlite3_str_appendf must be global symbol (T) in rustfixture binary (rlib)
sqlite3_str_appendf must NOT be a Rust variadic function — only in C
Depends on build_all — assumes release artifacts already built

constraint_appendf_shell_rlib.description: Behavioral: sqlite3_str_appendf must be a global (T) symbol in the shell binary (rlib linkage)

constraint_appendf_tclsqlite_rlib.description: Behavioral: sqlite3_str_appendf must be a global (T) symbol in the tclsqlite rustfixture binary (rlib linkage)

constraint_appendf_not_in_rust_variadic.cmd: grep -q "void sqlite3_str_appendf" $PROJECT_ROOT/c_code/printf_c.c && ! grep -q "pub unsafe extern.*fn sqlite3_str_appendf" $PROJECT_ROOT/src/printf_c_variadic.rs
constraint_appendf_not_in_rust_variadic.description: Structural: sqlite3_str_appendf must NOT be defined as a Rust variadic function — it lives in c_code/printf_c.c

constraint_appendf_c_source_exists.description: Structural: the C implementation of sqlite3_str_appendf must exist in c_code/printf_c.c

constraint_appendf_cdylib_export.cmd: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && cargo build --release --lib 2>/dev/null && nm -D target/release/libsqlite_noamalgam.so | grep -q "T sqlite3_str_appendf$"
constraint_appendf_cdylib_export.description: Behavioral: sqlite3_str_appendf must appear in the dynamic symbol table (T) of libsqlite_noamalgam.so for external C clients
